title: Himalaya Drug Company is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Himalaya Drug Company is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Himalaya Drug Company has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Kochi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Himalaya Drug Company:
Himalaya Drug Company is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Himalaya Drug Company!
